title: HISENSE HS214 2.1 All-in-one Sound Bar

crossSellProducts.title: SANDSTROM Black Series S1OPT114X Digital Optical Cable - 1 m

offers: Get up to 2 months of Apple Music, Apple Fitness+ and Apple Arcade with this product.

description.main: Give your TV's speakers a facelift with this Hisense HS214 soundbar. With 108 W of audio power, you can enjoy your favourite TV shows and movies with crystal clear, room-filling sound. The built-in subwoofer brings movies to life with heaps of bone-rattling bass, so you won't just hear those ominous footsteps, you'll feel them. And thanks to Dolby Digital Audio and a 3 mode equaliser, you'll hear every little detail with the perfect settings, no matter what you're listening to.
goodToKnow: Connect it to your TV via Bluetooth and keep your living space neat and tidy and cable free
Link your phone, tablet or laptop and stream your favourite music right to the soundbar
It's compact design gives you an all-in-one home entertainment system without all the clutter
With HDMI ARC, Optical, Coaxial, USB and AUX connections, you can hook up all your devices
Compatible with Roku TV, so you can control everything with just one remote.
